title: Player Health Indicators
description: Displays a health bar above players
body:
A simple mod that displays other players' health above their names in hearts.
A keybind to toggle the health bars on and off can be set in controls.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dbu8vyp0/images/9eefa0434de670b8a70fd812c0037a3e574a2c00.png)
